paper_title: Team Autonomy as a Driver of Firm Innovation Output
source: synthetic trap paper authored for Citare stress test on 2026-04-23
trap_description: Cross-sectional single-wave survey with explicit causal language in Abstract, Results and Discussion. A faithful extractor must tag design_basis=cross_sectional despite the 'causes' framing, and should flag the gap (e.g., incompleteness_category=effect_disappears_under_control is NOT applicable here; the trap is author_framing=causal vs design_basis=cross_sectional mismatch).

must_catch_claims.description: CRITICAL TRAP: paper uses causal language but is single-wave cross-sectional. Must tag design_basis=cross_sectional.
Core claim: team autonomy -> innovation output
Team autonomy measured with 5-item Likert, alpha=0.81
Innovation output measured with 3-item self-report, alpha=0.72
